passage.title: A Day with Notice Writing + Writing Skills Practice
passage.text: Notice: The school will remain closed tomorrow. All students must arrive on time. This notice is for all employees. The office will be closed tomorrow. This notice is effective immediately. Everyone should read this notice. A meeting will be held next Monday. Attendance of all members is compulsory. This notice has been put up on the board. Contact the office for any questions.
passage.hindiTranslation: सूचना: कल विद्यालय बंद रहेगा। सभी छात्रों को समय पर पहुँचना है। यह सूचना सभी कर्मचारियों के लिए है। कल कार्यालय की छुट्टी रहेगी। यह सूचना तुरंत प्रभाव से लागू है। सभी को यह सूचना पढ़नी चाहिए। आगामी सोमवार को बैठक आयोजित की जाएगी। सभी सदस्यों की उपस्थिति अनिवार्य है। यह सूचना बोर्ड पर लगाई गई है। किसी भी प्रश्न के लिए कार्यालय से संपर्क करें।

comprehensionQuestions.question: What does the passage say about: "Notice: The school will..."?
options: Attendance of all members is compulsory.
Visit the website for more information.
All students must arrive on time.
Notice: The school will remain closed tomorrow.
comprehensionQuestions.answer: Notice: The school will remain closed tomorrow.
comprehensionQuestions.explanation: Stated in the passage: "Notice: The school will remain closed tomorrow."

comprehensionQuestions.question: What does the passage say about: "All students must arrive..."?
options: This notice has been put up on the board.
Follow the above instructions.
This notice is for all employees.
All students must arrive on time.
comprehensionQuestions.answer: All students must arrive on time.
comprehensionQuestions.explanation: Stated in the passage: "All students must arrive on time."

comprehensionQuestions.question: What does the passage say about: "This notice is for..."?

comprehensionQuestions.explanation: Stated in the passage: "This notice is for all employees."

comprehensionQuestions.question: What does the passage say about: "The office will be..."?
options: This notice is in the interest of the students.
Writing skills improve with practice.

options: Please keep your documents ready.

options: This notice was circulated throughout the campus.

comprehensionQuestions.question: What does the passage say about: "Attendance of all members..."?
options: Visit the website for more information.
